item.title: Sam's Journey
item.description:
Last week I posted about Sam He's an anxious but wonderful dog that got returned to the rescue after being adopted
He was so sad and so confused to be back with us, his fosters We ran 30-40 miles a week and he eventually broke out of his funk
Once Sam got better mentally and emotionally he went up for adoption In rescue, people often only meet the dog for 20 minutes and if the dog isn't in their lap and giving kisses - they won't adopt.
That's a tough situation for a dog who spent the first few days completely unwilling to interact with me Potential adopters will never see how amazing he is in 20 minutes, they'll only see his anxiety.
Sam's story blew up on Twitter as I documented his struggles and successes One person following that story put in an application and came over to meet Sam
I told him that Sam takes a couple days to open up to people and he might not go anywhere near you The guy sat on my floor for an hour and Sam was too nervous to interact with him at all
But he got to see Sam play with me, flop on his back in my arms and show me love He got to see how amazing Sam was with my dogs and get an idea of how he would be after an adjustment period
AND THIS ANGEL OF A MAN DECIDED TO ADOPT MR SAMUEL BEANS ＼⁠(⁠°⁠o⁠°⁠)⁠／ Anyone who'll adopt an anxious dog that's too nervous to even be petted - the guy is a goddamn hero
Sam's last picture with us and...
His first picture with his adopter!!!
This was a hard one to say goodbye to, watching his progress in my home and being so terrified that he'd be returned again So when I saw an email from his adopter a few days later my heart absolutely sank and I didn't want to open it
And wouldn't you know it - Sam was being his amazing self right away and his adopter was already in love.
Sam was our 16th foster in only 10 months and most of them I was excited to get out of my house But he's one dog I will always miss and forever be proud of for the courage he showed
In my last post I asked people to vote for Sam in the rescue's calendar contest and Imgurians donated over $700 and Sam won!!! He's going to be the face of the 2025 Healing Hearts Calendar and I'm so happy for him and his adopter. I can't thank you enough for supporting the rescue that I volunteer for, they do such amazing work.
Sometimes a dog has a few detours before finding a perfect home, and that's okay. The most important thing is that Sam found a wonderful home with an incredible human and he'll experience love and joy for the rest of his life. ... Maybe someday Sam will be out on a huge run having the time of his life and remember the curly haired guy and his 2 little Pucketts. ... Stop by TheFreePizzaDude today if you have an upvote or you'd like to send a meal to someone in need! Let's send food to Imgurians in need https://imgur.com/gallery/ByLJnlK
item.dc:creator: MrPuckett

item.title: First world problems of a 36 year old woman
item.description:
I never went to college. I barely finished high-school. I was never a great student. I started working right away to support my family and just never had the money or opportunity until now. I lost my job at the beginning of the month (company bankrupted) and I'm honestly tired of working odd entry level jobs and working my way up to better positions only have to start over at a new job for whatever reason. I'm also tired of hiring managers telling me "we've decided to go with someone more qualified" before they've even interviewed me. Apparently, experience doesn't mean much anymore if you don't have a fancy college education to back it up. I'm considering going into the healthcare field. Either as an admin, health document professional, or medical transcriptionist. The course I plan to take covers all of this. My bf says he will support me financially so I don't have to worry about working. It feels weird. He makes more money than I ever have and I know he can easily do so, but it feels really weird for me to be supported when I've always been the one to support myself, my family, or at the very minimum, pay my half of life expenses (rent, groceries, etc) I just don't know. I feel too old for this, but I also feel like I NEED to do this unless I want to work retail, fast food or warehouse jobs the rest of my life. Also terrified I'm going to fail, because... as I said, I've never been a great student. I'm not dumb, I just never functioned well in a classroom setting. I also had a horrible relationship with math. Still do. I'm just so uncertain. Does anyone have any success stories of going to college late in life?
Thanks for listening to me moan about my first world/old people problems. Here's Rumi baking in the window for cat tax.
item.dc:creator: Semotion

item.title: What Happened Today #85
item.description: ?⚖️ A two-year-old American citizen was sent to Honduras after ICE ignored her family’s legal plan to keep her safely in the U.S. and exiled her alongside her undocumented mother. A conservative federal judge is furious. Meanwhile, a Wisconsin judge was arrested, cuffed, and detained for telling ICE to get the right warrant for a man in her courtroom and refusing to improperly let them take him into custody. This isn’t politics. It’s a war on the rule of law. Courts, inspectors general, and a May Day wall of workers are pushing back. Add your voice to the fight before there’s no one left to stand because first they came for the other people. Don’t trust the algorithm. Get this in your inbox every night, free and private, so you never miss what’s really going on. Add your email at https://govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist 1. https://go.govbrief.today/judge-collective-bargaining 2. https://go.govbrief.today/pride-kennedy-center 3. https://go.govbrief.today/judge-arrested 4. https://go.govbrief.today/subpoena-reporters 5. https://go.govbrief.today/rochester-sued-sanctuary 6. https://go.govbrief.today/UCBerkeley-investigation 7. https://go.govbrief.today/wikipedia-ed-martin 8. https://go.govbrief.today/student-visa 9. https://go.govbrief.today/salmonella-poultry 10. https://go.govbrief.today/doge-americorps 11. https://go.govbrief.today/bogden-taylor 12. https://go.govbrief.today/walczak-pardon 13. https://go.govbrief.today/hatch-reinterpret 14. https://go.govbrief.today/indigenous-mascots 15. https://go.govbrief.today/usaid-tech-devices 16. https://theintercept.com/2025/04/25/hegseth-defense-policy-board-pentagon-tucker-carlson/ 17. https://go.govbrief.today/womens-health-initiative 18. https://go.govbrief.today/irs-records-ig 19. https://go.govbrief.today/may-day-strong

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1342 (breaching containment)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
Yeah, that tracks.
Miragaia and Kentrosaurus
For wrath, ruin, and a red dawn.
(The joke here is that this is Sacred Datura, an incredibly toxic plant)
I must be doing this rite wrong, any advice?
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Pippin. Pippin. Beep. Pippin! [Unintelligible] okay okay okay. [Kiss noises] Glory." ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! If you're a woman or minority in a STEM field in Arizona living north of Phoenix and you need new headshots for this website or another detailing your experiences/research/accomplishment because our monstrous regime has deleted your experience from an official government website, PM me. Pippin and I have a good Nikon DSLR, and we'll do the photos for free, and, uh, you'll get to meet Pippin, I guess? (If you know someone who could use this who's not on Imgur, feel free to PM me to get my email address for them and tell them they're free to message me.) 3) Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself 4) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on.

item.title: Needs to be celebrated.Kansai just hit an unbelievable milestone — 30 YEARS without losing a single piece of luggage.That’s right: three decades of flawless baggage handling. No lost bags, no delays, just pure precision.
item.description: Kansai International Airport just hit an unbelievable milestone — 30 YEARS without losing a single piece of luggage. That’s right: three decades of flawless baggage handling. No lost bags, no delays, just pure precision. Meanwhile, some of us are still waiting on that suitcase from 2019 Seriously though, hats off to Kansai — this is the kind of airport excellence the world should be aiming for.

item.title: Is it possible to learn these memes?
item.description:
It is Minecraft, my dudes.
Reality defies parody.
Many waitresses have brought me beer and/or fried potatoes. No billionaire has ever brought me beer and/or fried potatoes. It's clear which contributes more to society.
"Say the line, Bart"
I'm sure that's nothing to worry about
:(
Beastie Boys lyrics are one of my favorite niche meme genres, right behind people who don't know that Spain exists.
It takes 1000 years but they'll finally jazz it up.
I feel attacked.
Jesus is a pretty chill guy if you read the canon and ignore the fandom.
You make me sad.
Every crab is a crab if holding if it tries hard enough. It holds with its little claws.
Is that not what cryptocurrency is? I'm confused as to why this is an Onion article.
Cobra Kai is a wild show. These two dudes haven't seen each other since they kicked the crap out of each other in a highschool karate tournament but decide to project their rivalry onto a bunch of kids. Then the one guy's other teen rival crashes on his couch to beat up the bad guys. And the other other teen rival owns a furniture store.
To be fair, given an infinite number of kids, it is still mathematically unlikely to happen.
This is the measurement system we should adopt as a species.
Yes
Replace Scottish and Irish with any two nationalities. Alternatively or Additionally, replace England with USA.
Nyooom
Neurobasic bitches are only in charge of everything because they have attention
Did you know that Sarek of Vulcan had a human wife who named their son after a Beastie Boys lyric?
Pinky is definitely a communist. Not saying it's a bad thing.
Flesh and Blood TCG tax. Not sponsored, just a fan.
